positive: A symmetrical, central composition of swirling cosmic fauna and celestial botanicals, featuring stylized bioluminescent deep-sea jellyfish floating amongst geometric nebula clouds and delicate crystalline plant life. The main elements should form a clean, bold silhouette against a contrasting, deep indigo void. Use a harmonious palette of royal blues, emerald greens, sapphire accents, and glowing coral highlights. The style should be a combination of Art Nouveau organic flow and minimalist psychedelic illustration, suitable for screen printing. Highly detailed linework, volumetric light source from the center, high contrast, vector art aesthetic, clean lines, perfect symmetry.
